name: St. Patrick's Day Frozen Dessert
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate (HERSHEY'S), broken into pieces
10 HERSHEY'S Nuggets Chocolates, any variety, chopped into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine the candy bar pieces and water.
Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is blended when stirred; stir in the beaten egg. Continue microwaving at MEDIUM (50%) for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until the mixture is very hot, but not boiling. Allow it to cool to lukewarm.
2. In a small bowl, beat the whipping cream until stiff. Gently fold this into the chocolate mixture.
3. Line muffin cups (2-1/2 inches in diameter) with foil bake cups. Fill each prepared cup about 3/4 full with the chocolate mixture and sprinkle chopped candy on top. Cover; freeze until firm.
4. Before serving, allow the dessert to stand at room temperature for about 10 minutes to soften slightly. Freeze any leftovers.
